name: Wisconsin Fairways
address: 2541 Main St Unit B & C, East Troy, WI 53120

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the site does not explicitly state rental availability, most indoor golf venues offer club rentals for visitors without equipment. It is recommended to call ahead to confirm.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: As a full-service bar venue, outside food and drinks are likely not permitted. The venue offers a full bar and food options for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: According to the venue, it typically takes 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue mentions fun for 'adults and juniors alike' and offers youth-friendly activities such as lessons.

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar featuring whiskey and wine tastings.
Menu includes pizza and food options for events.

about: Wisconsin Fairways is an indoor golf entertainment venue located in Wisconsin. The facility features four state-of-the-art golf simulator bays and a full-service bar, creating a year-round environment for golf enthusiasts and social visitors alike. The venue allows players to experience some of the best golf courses in the world without leaving the state, offering a modern and comfortable setting for various activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service bar with whiskey and wine tastings
Year-round league play and competitive events
Social atmosphere suitable for groups and parties
Ability to play world-famous courses locally
